title: senecio cadiscus
intro: Senecio cadiscus, also known as the Senecio plant, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to South Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Senecio cadiscus include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a popular remedy for colds, fever, and other respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal remedies, although it is essential to note that the plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which should be used with caution.
